Describe the progression of scenes from the vehicle exterior to the interior storage interaction.
canonical_answer: At 6s, the Range Rover grille and beige armrest are shown; at 12s, the interior view returns with text overlays visible; at 14s, a blue gloved hand holding a plastic bag appears near the console; at 18s, the gloved hand lifts the beige armrest to reveal the black storage compartment inside.

question: Detail the specific components of the center console and the actions taken to open it.
canonical_answer: At 8s, a beige armrest and black control panel with a yellow button are visible; at 12s, the yellow hazard button is clearly shown on the dashboard; at 14s, a hand wearing a blue glove enters the frame holding a bag; at 18s, the hand uses the hinge mechanism to open the beige armrest lid.
